title: InsForge/InsForge
abstract: The all-in-one, open-source backend platform for agentic coding. InsForge gives coding agents database, auth, storage, compute, model gateway and site deployment — the Supabase for AI agents.
abstract_zh: InsForge，就是给AI码农的全能后端平台！数据库、认证、存储、计算、模型网关和站点部署，应有尽有。就像Supabase，但更适合那些整天跟代码过不去的家伙们。一次配置，终生无忧！
